chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: Hello guys, my name is Nitish and you are welcome to my YouTube channel.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: In this video also we will continue our deep learning course.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: As I told you that we will do three small projects

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: after doing which we will get an idea

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: that how you can solve classification and regression problems

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: by making artificial neural networks in deep learning.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So we have already solved two problems.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: In last video we saw binary classification

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: when we worked on customer churn data set.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: In last video we did multiclass classification on MNIST data set

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: where there were 10 categories.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: And today we will work on a regression problem.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: We will learn that if you have a regression problem

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: then how you can work on it by making an artificial neural network.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: The data set we will use is a very simple data set

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: where you have some student's data

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: and that data set is about graduate admission.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: Basically, it is a data set of GRE

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: that how much score your candidates got for GRE, TOEFL,

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: apart from that how much strength they have in their resume.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: It is a data like this and we have to predict

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: that what is the chance of their admission.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So this is a regression problem

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: and we would use a neural network to solve this problem.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So let's start the video.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So guys, as I told you that in this video

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: we will solve a regression problem

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: with the help of an artificial neural network.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: And the data set is in front of us.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: Our data set is a graduate admission data set

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: where we have some columns.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: This data set is basically for those people

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: who apply for foreign universities.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: They have to give GRE and TOEFL exam

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: and apart from that they have to make their profile

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: to apply for those universities.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So if you notice here,

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: we have 7 columns.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So first is GRE score which is max up to 340.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: TOEFL score is 120.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: University rating, which university you are from,

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: what is its rating.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: Your statement of purpose.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: Also your letter of recommendation strength.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So whenever you apply,

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: you have to write a cover letter about yourself

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: that why do you want to pursue that particular course.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: Also you need a letter of recommendation

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: to apply for these universities.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So this recommendation can be of your professors

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: or someone else who has a very strong personality in your field.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: After that, how much CGPA was there in your undergraduate,

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: whether you have research experience or not.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: These are all your input columns.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: And your output column is chance of admit.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: Whether you will be admitted to that university or not.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: Between 0 and 1.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So you can see this is a regression problem

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: where the output is a number.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So we have to work on this data set.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: We have to make an artificial neural network

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: which can achieve the maximum R2 score.

chunks.text: this is a common wisdom

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: that you bring your inputs

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: on the same scale.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: Like here the score of GRE

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: is also 337.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So what does this indifference of scale do?

chunks.text: It delays your training process.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: There is a problem in converting

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: your weights.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So what will we do here?

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: We will scale our values.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: The scaling that we will use here

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: is min-max scaling.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: We will not use standard scaling.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: Because again as it is said

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: that min-max scaling

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: should be used when you

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: know upper bound and lower bound

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: of the values.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So whatever values are here,

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: there is an upper bound,

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: tight upper bound.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: It can be 340 in GRE,

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: it can be 120 in TOEFL.

chunks.title: Graduate Admission Prediction using ANN
chunks.text: So we will use min-max scaling.

chunks.text: After that we will make

text: Hello guys, my name is Nitish and you are welcome to my YouTube channel. In this video also we will continue our deep learning course. As I told you that we will do three small projects after doing which we will get an idea that how you can solve classification and regression problems by making artificial neural networks in deep learning. So we have already solved two problems. In last video we saw binary classification when we worked on customer churn data set. In last video we did multiclass classification on MNIST data set where there were 10 categories. And today we will work on a regression problem. We will learn that if you have a regression problem then how you can work on it by making an artificial neural network. The data set we will use is a very simple data set where you have some student's data and that data set is about graduate admission. Basically, it is a data set of GRE that how much score your candidates got for GRE, TOEFL, apart from that how much strength they have in their resume. It is a data like this and we have to predict that what is the chance of their admission. So this is a regression problem and we would use a neural network to solve this problem. So let's start the video. So guys, as I told you that in this video we will solve a regression problem with the help of an artificial neural network. And the data set is in front of us. Our data set is a graduate admission data set where we have some columns. This data set is basically for those people who apply for foreign universities. They have to give GRE and TOEFL exam and apart from that they have to make their profile to apply for those universities. So if you notice here, we have 7 columns. So first is GRE score which is max up to 340. TOEFL score is 120. University rating, which university you are from, what is its rating. Your statement of purpose. Also your letter of recommendation strength. So whenever you apply, you have to write a cover letter about yourself that why do you want to pursue that particular course. Also you need a letter of recommendation to apply for these universities. So this recommendation can be of your professors or someone else who has a very strong personality in your field. After that, how much CGPA was there in your undergraduate, whether you have research experience or not. These are all your input columns. And your output column is chance of admit. Whether you will be admitted to that university or not. Between 0 and 1. So you can see this is a regression problem where the output is a number. So we have to work on this data set. We have to make an artificial neural network which can achieve the maximum R2 score. So what we will do is we will code in Kaggle. We will click on new notebook. I will run the first cell. Like here the score of GRE is also 337. But here it is also 4, it is also 4.5. So what does this indifference of scale do? It delays your training process. There is a problem in converting your weights. So what will we do here? We will scale our values. The scaling that we will use here is min-max scaling. We will not use standard scaling. Because again as it is said that min-max scaling should be used when you know upper bound and lower bound of the values. So whatever values are here, there is an upper bound, tight upper bound. It can be 340 in GRE, it can be 120 in TOEFL. So we will use min-max scaling. After that we will make a very simple neural network.
